source_message: Oracle 06-25 NY-AM: approved NO-TRADE / stand-aside after fresh MNQ+MES review. Short bias was technically correct, but the 09:30 open already dumped hard and the rest of NY-AM chopped/two-sided with no clean continuation. Fresh mechanical packets conflicted by pair (MNQ B Inversion long at 10:52 ET, MES A+ Inversion short at 10:14 ET), both stopped, and pair-leader evidence was inconclusive. Correct lesson: hard day / post-open exhaustion / no convincing leader — do not force either side.

oracle_context.approval_note: User agreed 2026-07-01: preserve both fresh mechanical losers as rejected provenance; do not approve MNQ long or MES short.
oracle_context.day_read: Short bias was technically correct, but the 09:30 open dumped and the rest of the day went up/down without clean continuation; nothing really went anywhere.
oracle_context.live_fallback_note: Current deterministic open-reaction finalizer defaults null pair-leader evidence to PAIR_PRIMARY/MNQ1!, but this row treats the evidence truth as no convincing leader, not an MNQ approval.

rejected_candidates.reason_rejected: degraded htf_fallback / divergent / retrace-day B-capped context; opposite MES short also present; stopped before TP1
cleaner bearish mechanical read, but pair leader was inconclusive, MNQ pointed opposite, and price reversed into stop almost immediately
